ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave blank for effect to apply to every note. If you only want the effect on certain notes, change this to the name of the tag you will put in the `cssclasses` frontmatter field of target notes
ast.target: 留空则效果应用于所有笔记。如果您只希望效果应用于特定笔记，请将其更改为您将在目标笔记的 `cssclasses` frontmatter 字段中放置的标签名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frames per second of the animation

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long the scrambling animation will be, in miliseconds. The unscrambling time is independent of this
ast.target: 扰乱动画的持续时间，以毫秒为单位。解扰时间与此无关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Change all the settings back to default
ast.target: 将所有设置恢复为默认值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The scrambled title increases by one character every frame. Looks like somebody smashing their keyboard
ast.target: 扰乱的标题每帧增加一个字符。看起来像有人在猛敲键盘。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The title is typed out letter by letter, with older characters being unscrambled. Does not play a finishing animation because it finishes the text by itself. Additionally, doesn't change based on fps or duration settings
ast.target: 标题逐字打出，旧字符被解扰。不播放结束动画，因为它会自行完成文本。此外，不会根据 fps 或持续时间设置而改变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Using an easing function, the scrambled text overshoots the character limit of the title, then bounces back
ast.target: 使用缓动函数，扰乱的文本会超出标题的字符限制，然后弹回。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The title is unveilded letter by letter

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Same as regular finish, but it leaves errors the first time, then does a second pass to correct them
ast.target: 与常规完成相同，但第一次会留下错误，然后进行第二次修正。

ast.name: text
ast.source: There are multiple different scrambling animations. Pick which ones you'd like to see. One of the enabled ones is picked randomly when you open a note to animate the scrambling process. If nothing is picked, the regular options are used
ast.target: 有多种不同的扰乱动画。选择您想看到的动画。打开笔记时，会随机选择一个已启用的动画来演示扰乱过程。如果未选择任何动画，则使用常规选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: After some time, there is a separate animation to unveil the scrambled text
ast.target: 一段时间后，会有一个单独的动画来揭开被扰乱的文本。
